candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure for the company; explicitly labeled as total revenue and shows large, consistent values.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used as main revenue line.
Represents discontinued operations results, not core revenue.

candidates.row_label: Discontinued Operations - Tax Impacts - Current Income/Expense
candidates.why: Tax impacts, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Change in deferred tax on comprehensive income
candidates.why: Tax-related comprehensive income item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Balance sheet contract asset, not P&L revenue line.
Balance sheet accrued income, not total revenue line.
Deferred income liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the clear top-line revenue figure; other candidates are interest, tax, or balance sheet items and not suitable as main revenue.

candidates.why: Label suggests direct property operating costs (akin to cost of sales), but appears unpopulated in preview.
Matches the numeric total for operating costs and represents direct operating expenses; best available COGS proxy.
Explicitly part of SG&A, not direct cost of sales; should be excluded from COGS.
Likely part of operating/SG&A or other expenses, not core cost of goods sold; also appears unpopulated.
Mixed income/expense line, not pure COGS.

candidates.row_label: Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental
candidates.why: Appears to be a COGS-type category for rental operations but unpopulated in preview.
SG&A overhead, not COGS.
Financial result, not operating COGS.
Non-operating; not COGS.
Lease-related costs that could be operating but are not the main direct cost of sales line.

variables.notes: Operating expense mirrors the Operating costs total and functions as the main direct operating cost line; other candidates are either SG&A, non-operating, or unpopulated alternative labels.

candidates.why: Administration of letting/property; overhead in nature and part of SG&A-type costs.
More like direct property operating/COGS, not overhead.
Explicit SG&A component for personnel costs; fits SG&A definition well.
General administrative overhead; classic SG&A component.
Mixed line of income and expenses; not a pure SG&A component and should be avoided.

candidates.row_label: Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental
candidates.why: Direct operating costs of rental properties, closer to COGS.
Explicit SG&A line; core SG&A bucket.
Balance sheet item, not an expense component.
Balance sheet gross asset value, not SG&A expense.
Accumulated depreciation on assets; not SG&A operating expense.

variables.notes: Selected explicit SG&A and overhead components (administrative costs, labor in SGA, Selling/General/Admin, and letting & property administration). Excluded property operating expenses and other operating income/expense as they are closer to COGS or mixed items.
No R&D-related line items (e.g., research, development) appear in the provided income statement; XRD is treated as zero.

candidates.why: Explicit interest/finance expense line; good candidate but only populated in one year.
Represents finance income, not expense; should not be primary XINT.
Capitalized interest, not period expense recognized in P&L.
Main multi-year gross interest expense line; best representation of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; component of overall interest expense and useful as fallback.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
Equity attribution, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest, secondary candidate after main interest expense lines.
Balance sheet liability for unpaid interest, not P&L expense line.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority is given to the main gross interest expense line, with the broader finance expenses line and lease interest as fallbacks to capture interest expense across years.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not a balance sheet equity stock value.
Represents shareholders’ equity but is duplicative of the more precise 'Equity attributable to owners of parent'.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of parent
candidates.why: Explicitly the book equity attributable to owners/parent, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Includes non-controlling interests; only used if owner equity not available.
Technical balancing line, not the substantive equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line for the statement, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of parent

variables.notes: Equity attributable to owners of parent cleanly represents book equity attributable to the parent shareholders, excluding non-controlling interests, matching the BE definition.

candidates.why: P&L attribution of profit to NCI; reflects minority share of income, but balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB stock value.
Duplicate P&L attribution; again income not stock value.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; ideal for minority interest in equity.
Alternative label for the same non-controlling interests; good fallback.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not the equity stock of minorities.

variables.notes: Uses balance sheet non-controlling interests (and its alternate label) to capture minority interest in equity; income statement allocations are flows, not the stock of minority equity.
